name: MSSQL XPCmdshell Option Change
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: MSSQL XPCmdshell Option Change
SIGMA Description: Detects when the MSSQL "xp_cmdshell" stored procedure setting is changed.


False positives:
- Legitimate enable/disable of the setting
- Note that since the event contain the change for both values. This means that this will trigger on both enable and disable

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mssql%' AND "Event ID"=15457 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%xp_cmdshell%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MSSQL XPCmdshell Option Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mssql%' AND "Event ID"=15457 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%xp_cmdshell%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MSSQL XPCmdshell Option Change
